zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise de Mortimer於1078年3月29日出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾維格莫 卡素時，她的父親Lord Ranulph de Mortimer29歲，母親Melisende14歲。她和Estienne de Troyes至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1139年在英國賀福爾賀福德享年61歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾維格莫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise de Mortimer于1078年3月29日出生在英国英格兰賀福爾維格莫 卡素时，她的父亲Lord Ranulph de Mortimer29岁，母亲Melisende14岁。她和Estienne de Troyes至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1139年在英国賀福爾賀福德享年61岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾維格莫。

nameMeanings.name: Mortimer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Mortemer in Seine-Maritime, France, so called from Old French mort(e) ‘dead’ + mer ‘sea’, probably referring to a stagnant pond or drained swamp.

Irish (of Norman origin): the Norman surname in sense 1 above was taken to Ireland from England in the medieval period, where it has also been adopted by bearers of the Gaelic surnames Mac Muircheartaigh and ÓMuircheartaigh, commonly Anglicized as McMurty and Mortagh. Compare McMurdo .

variants.name: Mortimore
meanings: English (Devon; of Norman origin): variant of   Mortimer  .

variants.name: McMurdo
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Muircheartaigh or Mac Muircheartaich, ‘son of Muircheartach’, a personal name meaning ‘sea-ruler’. In Scotland the name was often lenited to give McCurdy . Compare Murdoch and Moriarty . The name was also used to Anglicize Mac Murchaidh (see McMorrow ).

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise de Mortimer was born on 29 March 1078, in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Lord Ranulph de Mortimer, was 29 and her mother, Melisende, was 14. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Estienne de Troyes. She died in 1139, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise de Mortimer est née le 29 mars 1078, à Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Ranulph de Mortimer, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Melisende, avait 14 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Estienne de Troyes. Elle est décédée en 1139, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Wigmore, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise de Mortimer am 29. März 1078 in Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lord Ranulph de Mortimer 29 und ihre Mutter Melisende 14. Sie hatte mit Estienne de Troyes mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1139 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England begraben.

Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Estienne de Troyes. Morì nel 1139, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Wigmore, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise de Mortimerが1078年3月29日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモー カストルで生まれた時，父Lord Ranulph de Mortimerは29歳，母Melisendeは14歳であった。彼女はEstienne de Troyesとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1139年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで61歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィグモーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise de Mortimer(이)가 1078년 3월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위그모어 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lord Ranulph de Mortimer(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Melisende(은)는 14세였다. 그녀는 Estienne de Troyes(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1139년 영국 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise de Mortimer nasceu em 29 de março de 1078, em Wigmore Castle, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Ranulph de Mortimer, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Melisende, tinha 14 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Estienne de Troyes. Ela faleceu em 1139, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise de Mortimer родилась 29 марта 1078 г. в местности вигмор кастл, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Lord Ranulph de Mortimer было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Melisende, 14. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Estienne de Troyes. Она умерла в 1139 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Estienne de Troyes. Murió en 1139, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Wigmore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
